title: Tangy Kenyan Tofu Curry
description: A light and flavorful Kenyan dish featuring tofu in a tangy curry sauce, made with mustard and a blend of spices, served in a cazuela.
instructions: Heat oil in a large cazuela over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the curry powder and mustard seeds and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tofu and cook until it is lightly browned on all sides.
Add the coconut milk, tomato paste, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
